title: AOMIKS Magnet Blocks 173 Piece Mini Magnetic Building Tiles Macaron Color 3D Building Blocks Inspirational& Educational STEM Toys for Kids Ages 3 4 5 6 7 8 Years Old
features: Safe STEM toys: These mini magnetic blocks for kids adopt ABS plastic and magnet, and the magnet is not exposed, with round corner design, it is safe for the child, and pale color will not stimulate children's eyes.

Multiple and variable shapes: It can be built into various shapes, and it is variable, which can be continuously built into new shapes to increase interest, With the growth of your children's age, this toy is still suitable for them to play.

Protect children's vision: With the mini-size magnetic tiles set, you can keep your child away from electronic devices since childhood, which can not only protect your child's vision, but also prevent your child from indulging in games or cartoons.

Great for creativity: Children can build buildings, animals, plants or vehicles they want through magnetic building blocks of different shapes and sizes, with various doors and windows. It can cultivate children's imagination and creativity, and let your children have fun in creation, it is a practical toy.

Ideal gift for kids: This is a great gift for both boys and girls, you can give the magnetic building toy as a birthday gift or a reward to your children or the children of your friends, relatives and colleagues, they will love it.
description: Product Description Not only a toy Exercise self-study ability If you have something to deal with, you can let you kids build the magnetic blocks by themselves, without too much intervention from adults, it can exercise their ability of self-learning and think independently. Educational & interesting Magnetic blocks building can change from 2D to 3D, which can make children feel the magical instant transformation, develop children's thinking ability, stimulate their imagination, stimulate the growth of brain cells, and can be changeable and connected arbitrarily to build a variety of shapes, it is of infinite interest. Strengthen relationships As magnetic blocks need much time to build most shapes, such as castles and animals, it is suitable for playing with their friends and parents. Not only can develop kids’ interpersonal relationship and language organization ability, but also can promote parent-child relationship and friendship. Package including 44 squares; 2riangles 16 semicircles;4 long triangles 2 arch parts; 4 sectors 2 trapezoids; 2 hexagons 2 pentagons; 1 rectangle 2 rhombuses;9 no magnetic accessories 4 vehicle wheels; 8 ferries wheel accessories 1 manual; 1 storage bag; 1 sticker simple 2D shapes For novices or younger children, they can start with simple 2D shapes, build some plants, animals and buildings, which can cultivate children's hands-on ability and hand-eye coordination ability. 3D buildings With these magnet blocks for kids, various buildings can be built. Every child has a castle dream in his heart. This toy set can help realize their dreams and cultivate their creativity. 3D animals With these magnetic tiles, you children can build all kinds of animals or plants, let them recognize various animals and plants through play, and you can place it in the house as decorations. 3D transportations With these girl magnet tiles and wheels, you can build various vehicles by yourself, then it can be used as a toy car. As the shape can be changed, it is an interesting and practical toy set. simple 2D shapes 3D buildings 3D animals 3D transportations Magnetic force is strong Magnetic building blocks of different shapes are connected by magnetic force to build various animals, plants, transport tools or buildings, it is recommended to build one by one to prevent rejection caused by stacking multiple pieces. Premium material It is made of ABS plastic and magnet, it can be used for a long time. Round corner design The magnetic building tiles adopt round corner design to avoid any scratching on your child's hands, and the magnet is not exposed, which is safe for the child. Support for washing These mini magnetic building tiles are support for washing, then when it is dirty, it can be washed. And the magnet is not fixed in the shape, this design is for the magnet to have a better effect.
